name: The Northern Hamlet Watchman (Village: Troitskoye)
description:
CONGRATULATIONS

YOU HAVE FINALLY BEEN HIRED AS A GUARD

IN THE NORTHERN VILLAGE

WHERE NO ONE HAS LIVED FOR A LONG TIME

THE PREVIOUS GUARD HAS DISAPPEARED

BUT LEFT BEHIND THIS NOTE

WITH THE RULES

RULE 1

IF A LIGHT COMES ON IN ONE OF THE HOUSES

DO NOT GO OUT

THERE HAS BEEN NO ELECTRICITY IN THE SETTLEMENT FOR A LONG TIME

RULE 2

SOMETIMES TOWARDS EVENING

YOU MAY HEAR FOOTSTEPS

AND HEAVY BREATHING AROUND THE CABIN

IT IS NOT A BEAR

TURN OFF THE LIGHTS

LIE DOWN ON THE FLOOR

AND STAY AWAY FROM THE WINDOWS

YOU WILL BE SAFE

WHEN EVERYTHING IS QUIET AGAIN

RULE 3

MAKE TWO ROUNDS A DAY

IF YOU SEE A PERSON

STARE AT YOU INTENSELY

FROM ONE OF THE WINDOWS

IMMEDIATELY RETREAT TO THE PERIMETER

AND REPORT THE INCIDENT ON THE RADIO

RULE 4

ONCE A WEEK, AROUND 1:30 A.M.,

SOMEONE MAY CONTACT YOU.

DO NOT RESPOND

UNLESS THEY GIVE YOU YOUR CALL SIGN.

EVEN IF THE VOICE SOUNDS FAMILIAR

RULE 5

NEVER ENTER HOUSES

ESPECIALLY IN THE CENTER OF THE VILLAGE

STRANGE NOISES MAY BE HEARD

FROM THEM

BUT REMEMBER THAT THERE IS NO ONE INSIDE

ALWAYS PATROL THE AREA

ONLY ALONG THE PERIMETER

WELCOME TO THE WATCH!

LOCATION: RUSSIA – SIBERIA, YEAR 1996.
creator: Tigurd
